meaning: n.鞭子,鞭打,睫毛,责骂,讽刺vt.鞭打,摆动,扎捆,冲击,煽动,讽刺vi.猛击,急速甩动
examples: She went quiet for a moment while she summoned up the words to lash him.
When this happens you might lash out.
In his writing online, especially on Twitter, Assange is quick to lash out at perceived enemies.
Heat guard Dwyane Wade didn't seem bothered that the 6-foot-8, 260-pound James chose to lash out.
